title: Welcome To Dormancy!
content:
Welcome to Dormancy, a mysterious realm where time stands still and secrets abound.  
In this wiki, you'll find everything you need to know about Dormancy, from its enigmatic history to the strange phenomena that occur within its borders. 
Whether you're a curious explorer or a seasoned adventurer, there's something here for everyone. 
So, dive in and uncover the mysteries of Dormancy!

title: Getting Started
content: This section will help you get started with Dormancy.

title: Crafting a Dagger!
summary: Guide on how to craft a dagger
content:
Collect 1 stone from [REDACTED] and a stick from a fallen tree.
Make your way to the nearest crafting table.
Press E while hovering over the crafting table with your mouse.
Find the dagger icon.
Press Craft!
ENJOY!

title: Killing a Chik!
content:
Find chik in [REDACTED].
Left click with your Dagger equipped.
hit it 5-6 times without getting hit yourself!
Loot the Corpse.
Tadaa, your first kill!

title: Fun Facts

title: Cube Cavern
content:
Cube Cavern is an early exploration-based experience on Roblox centered around navigating a vast, maze-like cave system composed primarily of simple, blocky geometry. 
The game places players in a dark, enclosed environment with little to no guidance, encouraging freeform exploration and discovery. 
The cavern is characterized by its minimalistic design, low lighting, and repetitive cubic structures, creating a disorienting and often unsettling atmosphere. 
Players traverse narrow tunnels, open chambers, and branching paths, often relying on limited visibility to progress. 
The lack of clear objectives or narrative contributes to a sense of isolation and ambiguity. 
Cube Cavern is notable for its ambient sound design and use of silence, which enhance tension and immersion despite the game’s simple visuals. 
While it does not feature traditional gameplay elements such as combat or structured progression, its focus on atmosphere and exploration has led it to be remembered as an influential early example of experimental horror and cave exploration games on Roblox.
